base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dpad_ring_control — a ui from 1986 dragon quest. Virtual D-pad ring — large concentric-ring control widget. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Virtual D-pad ring — large concentric-ring control widget; mobile port touch input overlay
